description: Regression: no charging model may END its charge move overlapping a terrain wall, even though it may pass *through* walls during the charge. Before the fix, ChargePhase._validate_charge_movement_constraints never called Measurement.model_overlaps_any_wall, so APPLY_CHARGE_MOVE dispatched server-side (multiplayer authoritative replay, tests, AI) silently landed the model on a wall — the same client/server divergence flagged in .llm/audit_2026_launch/findings/03_06_charge.md. After the fix, _validate_no_wall_overlaps rejects any final position overlapping a wall segment (FAIL_WALL). Warboss C (INFANTRY, ORKS) m1 starts at (1340, 1440); Shield-Captain A m1 is at (940, 1630). A ruin wall is injected on the segment (980,1560)-(1120,1560); a 40mm base centered at (1030, 1560) straddles it.

steps.script: TerrainManager.terrain_features.append({"id": "injected_wall_ruin", "type": "ruins", "polygon": PackedVector2Array([Vector2(980, 1540), Vector2(1120, 1540), Vector2(1120, 1580), Vector2(980, 1580)]), "height_category": "medium", "position": Vector2(1050, 1560), "size": Vector2(140, 40), "rotation": 0.0, "can_move_through": {"INFANTRY": true, "VEHICLE": false, "MONSTER": false}, "walls": [{"id": "injected_wall_seg", "type": "solid", "blocks_los": true, "start": Vector2(980, 1560), "end": Vector2(1120, 1560), "blocks_movement": {"INFANTRY": false, "VEHICLE": true, "MONSTER": true}}]})
